summary: Iteration 3 (both) — Backend contact API with Resend graceful-skip + new Blog/News section + new hi-res logo verified. All 6 pytest backend tests pass. Full frontend regression: blog section renders 3 cards with cover images, categories, dates, titles, excerpts, and Read article links; News nav link smooth-scrolls to #blog; language toggle translates all blog content EN<->FR; contact form still submits with success toast and clears; logo loads at 1233x310 transparent; 0 console errors; 0 broken images (16 total).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: _send_lead_notification correctly guards on RESEND_API_KEY and CONTACT_RECIPIENT before importing resend usage; uses asyncio.to_thread to avoid blocking event loop — good.
server.py: on POST /contact, if resend send throws inside try/except the message is still returned 200 to the user (log-only error) — good design for lead capture.

Blog.jsx: date paragraph and eyebrow both use classes containing 'uppercase' (p.uppercase selector picks first). Not a bug, but future test authors should prefer explicit data-testids for date/category/title if needed.
Consider a top-level lang attribute on <html> to reflect current language for a11y (currently only React state).
seed_data_creation: 2 backend pytest contact submissions (TEST_John Doe, TEST_NoPhone) + 1 UI contact submission (TEST_UI_Iter3). All prefixed with TEST_ for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend: RESEND_API_KEY intentionally empty in /app/backend/.env — /api/contact returns 200 and logs 'Resend not configured; skipping email notification.' Confirmed in /var/log/supervisor/backend.*.log. When user adds RESEND_API_KEY, real send will attempt via asyncio.to_thread(resend.Emails.send). Frontend: new Blog section between Testimonials and CTA with data-testids blog-section, blog-post-0..2, blog-read-0..2. Nav News link (href='#blog') smooth-scrolls and translates ('News' EN / 'Actualités' FR). Logo is /efasol-logo.png 1233x310. All 16 images load OK. Note: 'Innovation' is identical in FR and EN so post0_cat 'unchanged' on toggle is expected behavior, not a bug.
